testcase.name: test_multi_profile_cascades_across_tabs

failure.message: AssertionError: ['38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16\'', 'Shake', '38 Series Vertical Panel'] assert 3 == 2 + where 3 = len([{'name': '38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16\'', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: LAP 1840 ft²', 'qty': 202.4, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}, {'name': 'Shake', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: SHAKE 168 ft²', 'qty': 18.5, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}, {'name': '38 Series Vertical Panel', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: BOARD BATTEN 60 ft²', 'qty': 1.9, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}])

testcase.failure: tests/test_measure_map_per_profile_http.py:113: in test_multi_profile_cascades_across_tabs assert len(lp) == 2, [l["name"] for l in lp] E AssertionError: ['38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16\'', 'Shake', '38 Series Vertical Panel'] E assert 3 == 2 E + where 3 = len([{'name': '38 Series Lap 3/8" x 8" x 16\'', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: LAP 1840 ft²', 'qty': 202.4, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}, {'name': 'Shake', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: SHAKE 168 ft²', 'qty': 18.5, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}, {'name': '38 Series Vertical Panel', 'note': 'Per-elevation breakdown: BOARD BATTEN 60 ft²', 'qty': 1.9, 'section': 'LP Smart Siding', ...}])

testcase.name: test_accessories_still_emit_when_multi_profile

failure.message: AssertionError: Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris assert ('J-Channel' in 'Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris' or 'j-channel' in 'charter oak standard color dutch lap 4.5" .046 | pelican bay shakes 9" | vertical board and batten standard color 7" | outside corners standard color | .019 coil (1 per 5 sq siding) | house wrap | 2" nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 sq) | 1 1/4" trim nails | caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris') + where 'charter oak standard color dutch lap 4.5" .046 | pelican bay shakes 9" | vertical board and batten standard color 7" | outside corners standard color | .019 coil (1 per 5 sq siding) | house wrap | 2" nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 sq) | 1 1/4" trim nails | caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf88b5a2f9210>() + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf88b5a2f9210> = 'Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris'.lower

testcase.failure: tests/test_measure_map_per_profile_http.py:135: in test_accessories_still_emit_when_multi_profile assert "J-Channel" in names or "j-channel" in names.lower(), names E AssertionError: Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris E assert ('J-Channel' in 'Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris' or 'j-channel' in 'charter oak standard color dutch lap 4.5" .046 | pelican bay shakes 9" | vertical board and batten standard color 7" | outside corners standard color | .019 coil (1 per 5 sq siding) | house wrap | 2" nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 sq) | 1 1/4" trim nails | caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris') E + where 'charter oak standard color dutch lap 4.5" .046 | pelican bay shakes 9" | vertical board and batten standard color 7" | outside corners standard color | .019 coil (1 per 5 sq siding) | house wrap | 2" nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 sq) | 1 1/4" trim nails | caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris' = <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf88b5a2f9210>() E + where <built-in method lower of str object at 0xf88b5a2f9210> = 'Charter Oak Standard color Dutch Lap 4.5" .046 | Pelican Bay Shakes 9" | vertical board and batten Standard color 7" | Outside corners Standard color | .019 Coil (1 per 5 Sq Siding) | House Wrap | 2" Nails 30 lbs (1 per 15 Sq) | 1 1/4" Trim Nails | Caulking (per color) | clean up/ haul away job debris'.lower
